seoDescription: TreePro Professional Tree Care of Sebastopol — owner Ron Wallace and his crew have provided certified-arborist-directed tree pruning, removal and stump grinding across Sonoma County since 1990. Free estimates and 24/7 emergency service.
heroHeading: Certified-arborist tree care in Sebastopol since 1990
heroSubheading: TreePro Professional Tree Care is Ron Wallace's Sebastopol tree company — every job is completed under the direction of a Certified Arborist, from routine pruning to hazardous removals and stump grinding across Sonoma County.
highlights: Work directed by a Certified Arborist
aboutBody: TreePro Professional Tree Care has been the professional choice for tree care in and around Sebastopol since 1990. Owner Ron Wallace, a Certified Arborist, and his crew serve homeowners and property managers throughout Sonoma County.

Every TreePro job is completed under the direction of a Certified Arborist, so trees are pruned, shaped or removed the right way. Services range from tree pruning and hazardous tree removal to stump grinding, tree consulting and 24/7 emergency response, and TreePro even grows replacement trees in its own nursery. The company is rated 4.8 on Angi across years of customer reviews.

services.title: Tree Pruning & Shaping
services.description: Arborist-directed pruning and shaping to keep trees healthy, safe and well-formed.

services.title: Tree Removal
services.description: Safe removal of hazardous, dead or unwanted trees by an experienced crew.

services.title: Stump Grinding
services.description: Grinding down leftover stumps so you can reclaim the space in your yard.

services.title: Consulting & Emergency Service
services.description: Tree consulting plus 24/7 emergency response when storms or hazards strike.

notes: Sources: Yelp (82 reviews), Angi (4.8 rating), BBB (Golden Gate; profile under review, NOT accredited), BuildZoom, business.sebastopol.org. Website status: NO standalone website found (Yelp / Nextdoor / directory listings only) — strong target. Owner Ron (Ronald Patrick) Wallace; est. 1990 (BBB founding date 12/1/1990). Phone (707) 829-3300; alt (888) 873-3776. Address PO Box 722, Sebastopol, CA 95473 (mailing). TRUST SIGNAL = verified Angi 4.8 rating + 82 Yelp reviews + Certified-Arborist-directed work. NOTE: CSLB licenses #473640 and #680182 are INACTIVE/cancelled per BuildZoom — deliberately did NOT use a CSLB license as the trust signal; relied on the verified rating + arborist credential instead. No exact review quote captured (Yelp 403 in this env), so testimonials left empty rather than fabricate.
